Description:
• 
This spa should be located in a spacious 
tranquil and peaceful environment.

• 
The approach should reflect the security 
and the tranquility expected of a spa. 
• 
The 
access 
shall 
be 
easy 
and 
convenience for the guest.

• 
The building shall be purpose built for a 
spa.  
• 
The  building 
should  have 
an 
air  of 
spaciousness and reflect the character of 
the spa. 
• 
The  overall  design  of 
the  spa  should

desired  levels  of  comfort,  serenity  and 
tranquility.

• 
Compound should be well laid down and 
maintain in the manner befitting a spa of 
and international standard. 
• 
The 
landscaping, 
where 
applicable 
should 
complement 
the 
natural 
environment.

• 
The  maintenance  of  all  areas  of  the  spa 
should be of very high standard in terms 
of cleanliness, sanitation and hygiene.
